tasks.label: Start Emulator
tasks.command: $running = adb devices | Select-String -Pattern '^emulator-\d+\s+device'; if ($running) { Write-Host 'Emulator already running; skipping start.'; exit 0 }; emulator -avd Pixel_4a

tasks.label: Wait for Emulator Boot
tasks.command: adb wait-for-device; do { $boot = (adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null).Trim(); if ($boot -ne '1') { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } } while ($boot -ne '1')

tasks.label: Install APK
tasks.command: adb reconnect | Out-Null; adb start-server | Out-Null; adb wait-for-device; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk

tasks.label: Launch APK
tasks.command: adb reconnect | Out-Null; adb start-server | Out-Null; adb wait-for-device; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; adb shell monkey -p com.hyper.choosebrowsernew -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: Build & Launch APK
tasks.command: .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; adb reconnect | Out-Null; adb start-server | Out-Null; adb wait-for-device; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; adb shell monkey -p com.hyper.choosebrowsernew -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
